werbung.title: Advertisement
werbung.ad_space_desc: Present your business specifically in one country or expand your reach to an international audience.

media4u.title: MEDIA4U
media4u.h1: Modern Digital Art and Innovative Communication Tools
media4u.p1: media4u.ch is your destination for modern digital art and innovative communication tools. With my range of SMS text images and ASCII movies, I offer you creative and extraordinary experiences.
media4u.p2: My website is available in 20 languages to reach an international audience and give everyone the opportunity to enjoy my unique artworks. Additionally, I offer advertising spaces and affiliate programs in the field of SMS text images and Text Images 2.0. This provides companies with creative advertising opportunities while supporting my platform.
media4u.h3: Experience Digital Art in a New Way
media4u.p3: Dive into the world of digital art and discover what media4u.ch has to offer you! Experience creative communication in a new light and share it with the world.
media4u.p4: This website, developed with JavaScript and React, combines modern web development with my passion for digital art. With these technologies, my SMS text images and ASCII artworks are created in innovative formats. They demonstrate how technology and creativity merge to create unique digital experiences.

werbepartner.title: Advertising Partners
werbepartner.h1: Increase Your Reach – Advertise on My Website!
werbepartner.p1: Would you like to showcase your products or services to a broad audience? My website offers the ideal platform to make your brand known and attract new customers.
werbepartner.p2: Nationwide Visibility: Reach visitors from all over the country and effectively increase your reach. Maximum Attention: Your advertisement will be displayed to all visitors, regardless of their location. Fair Presentation: The order of advertisements is randomly rearranged with each page load, ensuring all advertising partners have an equal chance of visibility. Privacy Guaranteed: I only determine the visitors' country of origin – no other data is collected.
werbepartner.p3_1: For the first 90 days, you pay only 140 CHF per 30 days of presence.
werbepartner.p3_2: From the 91st day, the price reduces to 120 CHF per 30 days of presence (for days 91 to 180).
werbepartner.p3_3: From the 181st day, the ad space costs only 100 CHF per 30 days of presence.
werbepartner.p3_5: A link to your offer (product or service page)
werbepartner.p3_6: A link to an image to be used in the ad space
werbepartner.p3_7: Your ad space will only be displayed to visitors from the respective country. If you wish to advertise internationally, you can purchase additional ad spaces for other countries.
werbepartner.p3_8: Secure your ad space now and target your audience precisely – tailored to the region that is relevant to you!
werbepartner.h4: Your Security is Important to Me:
werbepartner.p4: I focus on quality and trustworthiness. Each advertising partner is personally reviewed by me to ensure they are reputable companies that meet my high standards.
werbepartner.h5: Ready to Take the Next Step?
werbepartner.p5: Contact me today and place your brand on my website – together, we will develop a strong presence and drive your business forward sustainably.
werbepartner.p6: Send me a message if you need more information or want to book an ad space directly. I look forward to supporting you on your path to success!

werbepartner_info.title: Advertising Partners - Info
werbepartner_info.content_p1: Present your company targetedly in one country or expand your reach to an international audience.

affiliate_marketing.title: Affiliate Marketing
affiliate_marketing.h1: Affiliate Links and Transparency on My Website
affiliate_marketing.p1: On my website, I use affiliate links to introduce you to suitable products and services. Transparency is especially important to me. Below, I explain how affiliate links work and what this means for you.
affiliate_marketing.p2: Affiliate links are special links that lead to products or services from partner companies. When you make a purchase through such a link, I earn a commission. This does not incur any additional costs for you.
affiliate_marketing.h3: Why Do I Use Affiliate Links?
affiliate_marketing.p3: Using affiliate links helps me operate the website and provide content for free. I carefully select my partners and the recommended products, ensuring they match the topics and interests of my visitors.
affiliate_marketing.p4: To track that the purchase was made through my link, my partner companies use cookies. These store information for a limited time when you click on an affiliate link. You can find more information about this in my privacy policy.
affiliate_marketing.p5: Important to know: Clicking on affiliate links does not create any disadvantages for you. The prices of products or services remain unchanged, and there are no hidden fees.
affiliate_marketing.p6: I only recommend products and services that I am convinced of. However, I do not assume any liability for the quality or availability of the advertised offers, as these are provided by my partners.
affiliate_marketing.p7: My goal is to communicate transparently and honestly with you. If you have any questions about affiliate links or my partnerships, do not hesitate to contact me. I appreciate your trust in my recommendations!

affiliate_marketing_partner.hinweis: * Als Amazon-Partner verdiene ich an qualifizierten Verkäufen.

front_end_developer.title: Frontend Developer
front_end_developer.projekt_title_p1: Here you’ll find an overview of my previous work:
front_end_developer.projekt_kunden_partner_info: This section will showcase future clients and partners.
front_end_developer.h1: Welcome to my world as a Frontend Developer!
front_end_developer.p1: This website reflects my passion for modern, scalable web development. As a career changer, I built it using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS – technologies that enable dynamic, interactive, and visually engaging applications.
front_end_developer.li_1: HTML: Clean, semantic, and maintainable structure.
front_end_developer.li_2: CSS: Flexible, responsive designs optimized for all devices.
front_end_developer.li_3: JavaScript & React: Dynamic interactivity and high performance for scalable and intuitive user experiences.
front_end_developer.p2: My focus is consistently on performance, scalability, and best practices to create professional, maintainable, and future-proof web applications.
front_end_developer.p3: Beyond creating this website, I continuously deepen my knowledge of React and JavaScript, always striving to write code of the highest quality – modular, efficient, and well-structured.
front_end_developer.p4: I'm actively seeking challenging projects – whether for companies, agencies, or innovative independent initiatives – where I can fully contribute and expand my expertise.
front_end_developer.p5: This website is not only my portfolio, but also a living testament to my capabilities and ongoing development in the frontend field.
front_end_developer.p6: Are you looking for a dedicated Frontend Developer who transforms innovative ideas into scalable, maintainable, and high-performance solutions?
front_end_developer.p7: Get in touch – I'm excited about new and inspiring projects!

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.title_p: Protecting your personal data is particularly important to me. In this privacy policy, I inform you about what data is collected, processed, and stored on my website, as well as your rights regarding this data.
datenschutz.erhebung_und_speicherung_personenbezogen: 2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
When visiting my website, the following data may be automatically collected:
Referring URL (e.g., from which page you came)
This data is anonymized and used solely for statistical purposes and to improve the website. No trace back to your person is possible.
datenschutz.verwendung_personenbezogener_daten_p: Personal data such as name, email address, or phone number is only collected if you voluntarily provide it, e.g., via the contact form. This data is used exclusively to process your request and is not shared with third parties unless required by law.
datenschutz.cookies_p1: My website uses cookies to analyze site usage and make the visit more user-friendly.
datenschutz.cookies_p2_1: Necessary Cookies: Essential for the operation of the website.
datenschutz.cookies_p2_2: Analytics Cookies: Help understand and improve website usage (e.g., through Google Analytics).
datenschutz.cookies_p2_3: You can restrict or completely disable the use of cookies in your browser settings.
datenschutz.google_analytics_p1: This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA („Google“).
datenschutz.google_analytics_p2: Google Analytics uses cookies that allow the analysis of your use of the website. The information generated by these cookies about your use of this website is usually transmitted to a Google server in the USA and stored there.
datenschutz.google_analytics_p3_2: IP anonymization is enabled on this website. This means that your IP address is truncated by Google within member states of the European Union or in other contracting states of the Agreement on the European Economic Area before transmission to the USA.
datenschutz.google_analytics_p4_2: Google uses this information to evaluate your use of the website, compile reports on website activities, and provide other services related to website usage and internet usage.
datenschutz.google_analytics_p5_2: You can prevent the storage of cookies by adjusting your browser software settings accordingly. Additionally, you can prevent the collection of data generated by the cookies and related to your use of the website (including your IP address) by Google and the processing of this data by Google by downloading and installing the following browser plugin:
datenschutz.google_analytics_p6_1: For more information on the terms of use of Google Analytics, visit:
datenschutz.werbepartner_und_affiliate_links_p1: I work with advertising partners and affiliate programs. When you click on an affiliate link or an ad, third-party providers may set cookies or collect data to measure the success of their ads or sales.
datenschutz.werbepartner_und_affiliate_links_p2: For more information about the privacy policies of these partners, visit their websites.
datenschutz.deine_rechte_p1_2: Access the data I have stored about you
datenschutz.deine_rechte_p1_4: Delete your data, as far as legally permissible
datenschutz.deine_rechte_p1_7: To exercise these rights, please contact me via email at roman.messmer@media4u.ch.
datenschutz.datensicherheit_p: I implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
datenschutz.änderungen_dieser_datenschutzerklärung_p: This privacy policy is updated as needed to comply with legal requirements or to adapt to changes on the website.

agb.title: Terms and Conditions (T&C)
agb.title_p2: These Terms and Conditions (T&C) govern the use of the website media4u.ch as well as the services and content offered. By accessing the website, you agree to the following terms.
agb.geltungsbereich_p: These T&C apply to all visitors of the website media4u.ch, as well as to customers who use the offered services or participate in advertising partnerships and affiliate programs.
agb.leistungen_p1_2: Artistic entertainment (e.g., SMS Text Images, Text Images 2.0, and ASCII Movies).
agb.leistungen_p1_3: Advertising spaces for advertising partners and affiliate marketing.
agb.leistungen_p1_4: Services in the field of frontend development.
agb.leistungen_p1_5: The website serves to present artistic content and market advertising spaces as well as promote my services.
agb.vertragsabschluss_p1_1: The contract between you and media4u.ch is concluded when:
agb.vertragsabschluss_p1_2: You apply for an advertising space or affiliate partnership and it is confirmed by me.
agb.vertragsabschluss_p1_3: You make an inquiry for my services as a frontend developer and accept an offer from me.
agb.vertragsabschluss_p1_4: The contract is concluded in writing via email.
agb.preise_und_zahlungsbedingungen_p1_1: For advertising partners, the following payment terms apply:
agb.preise_und_zahlungsbedingungen_p1_2: The price for an advertising space is agreed upon individually.
agb.preise_und_zahlungsbedingungen_p1_3: Payments must be made before the start of the term.
agb.preise_und_zahlungsbedingungen_p1_4: For services as a frontend developer, prices are determined upon agreement.
agb.preise_und_zahlungsbedingungen_p2: Refunds of already made payments are excluded unless there is fault on my part.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_2: The content of the website (including artistic works) may only be used or distributed with explicit permission.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_3: Any unauthorized use or copying of the content is prohibited.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_5: Visitors and customers are obliged not to misuse the website, e.g., by spreading harmful content, spam, or unauthorized advertising.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_6: The use of advertising spaces and affiliate programs must comply with legal requirements.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_8: I assume no liability for the accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of the content on the website.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_9: I do not assume any liability for damages resulting from the use of the website or from linked third-party content.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_11: Advertising partners commit to promoting only reputable and legally permissible content.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_12: media4u.ch reserves the right to reject content that does not meet the website's standards.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p1_14: If the website is unavailable for a day or longer, the missed days will be added for free to the next booking of at least 30 days. This only applies to paid advertising spaces and requires ongoing collaboration. Payouts or separate compensation for downtime days are excluded.
agb.rechte_und_pflichten_der_nutzer_p2: Affiliate programs are implemented in collaboration with external providers. I am not responsible for the content and privacy policies of these providers.
agb.verfügbarkeit_der_webseite_p: I strive to keep the website available at all times. However, uninterrupted availability cannot be guaranteed, e.g., during maintenance, technical disruptions, or force majeure.
agb.urheberrecht_p: All content on media4u.ch is protected by copyright. Use without my written permission is prohibited.
agb.änderungen_der_agb_p: I reserve the right to change these T&C at any time. Changes will be published on the website and are effective from the date of publication.
agb.gerichtsstand_und_anwendbares_recht_p: Swiss law applies to all disputes. The place of jurisdiction is Bülach, Switzerland.

sms_textbild.title: SMS Text Image
sms_textbild.p1: Memories that connect us. The iconic text images from old Nokia phones like the 3210 and early Ericsson and Motorola models shaped an entire era. These small masterpieces, once sent via SMS, I now revive – newer and more modern than ever before.
sms_textbild.p2: On my website, you'll exclusively find designed text image animations that you can easily enjoy and share. Each image is a unique creation, lovingly handcrafted to blend the charm of the past with today's simplicity. The font used resembles the classic Nokia font but is not identical. If you particularly like a text image, you can share it via a link – making every message a special experience.
sms_textbild.p3: These text images are more than just memories – they are art. Each animation is handcrafted and meticulously detailed to reinterpret the aesthetics of classic SMS text images.
sms_textbild.h3: Timeless Designs, Reinvented for the Moment
sms_textbild.p4: I have revitalized the magic of old text images. Through animated representations, the iconic designs come to life in a modern way – making the nostalgia of the past shine anew.
sms_textbild.p5: With a single link, you send not just a message but an experience. A nostalgic moment that you can share with others.

textbild2.title: Text Image 2.0
textbild2.p1: Redefining creativity. With Text Image 2.0, classic text images undergo a revolution. Enhanced features such as overlapping characters, various font sizes and colors, rotations and reflections, and free placement on the display create artworks never seen before.
textbild2.p2: On my website, you'll find these new, complex text image creations that you can explore and share. Each piece is a unique result of creativity and innovation, combining the tradition of old SMS text images with the possibilities of modern technology.
textbild2.p3: Text Images 2.0 are more than just an evolution – they are a new form of art. Using colors, variable font sizes, and dynamic elements, each image comes to life as a vibrant masterpiece that delights the senses.
textbild2.p4: I have reinvented the magic of classic text images. With modern technology and creative design tools, works are created that merge the nostalgia of the past with the innovation of the present.
textbild2.p5: With Text Image 2.0, every message becomes a special experience. Share these unique artworks with friends and family and experience how creativity connects people.

ascii_art_film.title: ASCII Art Film
ascii_art_film.h1: The Matrix in Text Form: A New Dimension of ASCII Art
ascii_art_film.p1: You might already be familiar with my earlier ASCII movies, which presented scenes from the Matrix trilogy in a unique text art form. These early works demonstrated how complex films could be depicted in minimalist ASCII form.
ascii_art_film.h2: A New Perspective: The Matrix Classics in a Fascinating Text World
ascii_art_film.p2: Now, I present an improved version of these works. The new ASCII movies offer even more detailed and higher-quality representations of the iconic Matrix scenes. Through technological advancements, these ASCII artworks provide an even more impressive interpretation of the film classics, allowing you to experience the Matrix in an entirely new way.
ascii_art_film.p3: Feel free to share these ASCII movies with friends, acquaintances, and family so they too can enjoy this unique art form.
